== Bug fixes and improvements

=== Integrations

* Removed the Figma and SauceLabs integrations from the *Integration* settings tab. Both integrations were retired and no longer functional. The *Integration* tab now shows *Issue Tracking (Jira)*, *TestRail*, and *Visual Validation (Applitools)*.
